queue.title: PAM Automation Engineer
queue.description: Genesis10 is currently seeking a PAM Automation Engineer for a remote position with a Major Financial Institution. This is a 12-month contract-to-hire opportunity. Overview Our client is seeking a PAM Automation Engineer to join the Privileged Access Management Services team. This role focuses on building and supporting automation that enables secure access elevation services across Unix, Linux, and other non-Microsoft systems. queue.title: Mainframe Automation Engineer

Demonstrated strong written and communication skills. Ability to use TSO and ISPF. JCL skills. Ability to write REXX and working knowledge of the System Automation Policy Database (PDB).
